cases.caption: An elderly man sighs deeply, then says, 'I thought the storm would never pass.'
A young woman whispers, 'Keep the lantern covered,' then hisses softly for silence.
A low raspy man growls, 'Get away from the door.'
A frightened woman gasps sharply, then shouts, 'Run! The bridge is collapsing!'
A powerful man screams, 'Somebody help me!' then pants for breath.
A gentle tenor sings, 'Morning light is calling me home,' holding the final note.
A tired woman moans softly, then says, 'I cannot take another step.'
A nervous man swallows audibly, clicks his tongue, and says, 'Well, that was awkward.'
A tense woman hisses through her teeth, then mutters, 'This is going to hurt.'
A breathless athlete grunts three times, then says, 'One more.'
